papers.title_en: A 65 nm Multi-Modal Bayesian Inference Engine with 16.3 fJ/Sample Calibration-Free GRNG for Risk-Aware At-Home Skin Lesion Screening
papers.authors: Steven Davis, Likai Pei, Jianbo Liu, Zephan M. Enciso, Boyang Cheng, Xueji Zhao, Danny Z. Chen, Ningyuan Cao
papers.evidence: 直接采用存内计算架构
papers.tldr: 针对家庭皮肤病变筛查的隐私与不确定性挑战，提出65nm全片上多模态贝叶斯推理引擎，采用计算存储架构执行词内混合高斯采样以增强概率表达。相比单峰贝叶斯网络，等风险操作覆盖提升1.4倍，对用户数据扰动鲁棒性提升超1.5倍，工艺变化弹性提升5.5倍，平衡精度提高1.8%。利用互补工艺变差实现无校准高斯随机数生成，能效达16.3fJ/样本，面积效率168.6GSa/s/mm²。该工作为隐私保护的边缘医疗AI提供节能、鲁棒的风险感知方案。
papers.abstract_en: We present a 65-nm risk-aware multimodal Bayesian inference engine for privacy-preserving, fully on-device skin lesion screening under uncontrolled at-home conditions. The proposed compute-in-memory architecture performs in-word Mixture-of-Gaussian sampling, improving uncertainty modeling beyond conventional unimodal Bayesian neural networks. This added probabilistic expressiveness increases equal-risk operating coverage by 1.4x, improves robustness to user-data perturbations by >1.5x, enhances process-variation resilience by 5.5x, and improves balanced accuracy by 1.8% over state-of-the-art unimodal Bayesian neural networks. Hardware robustness is further supported by calibration-free Gaussian random-number generation using complementary process variation, achieving 16.3 fJ/sample and 168.6 GSa/s/mm^2 efficiency. These results demonstrate a practical, energy-efficient, and risk-aware edge-AI solution for privacy-conscious medical screening.
